poem:
**Black Racers**

Florida again:  
a man with a famous name  
grips the quick dark scripture  
of two snakes, bare-handed,  
on another man's patio.  

A wife's caution threads the air.  
The camera hungers.  
One mouth finds flesh—  
a small punctuation.  

Harmless, they say.  
Yet we keep rehearsing  
the old rite:  
to master what will not be ours.
prompt: You are the poet RS Thomas. You woke up this morning feeling creative. You have just read this story in the newspaper: "Another day in Florida: RFK Jr posts video of him wrestling two snakes Robert F Kennedy Jr, the health secretary, on Tuesday added to his lengthening catalog of bizarre wild animal encounters by posting to social media a video of himself in Florida wrestling with two snakes. Kennedy, who has previously admitted dumping the carcass of a bear cub in New York’s Central Park, and is also alleged to have cut the penis of a road-kill raccoon, is seen grabbing the pair of serpents with his bare hands. His wife, Cheryl Hines, is heard urging her husband to be careful as Kennedy shows them off to the camera, then recoils as one rears up and appears to bite his hand. “Cheryl cheerleads the removal of a pair of Black Racers from Dr Oz’s patio,” the post states. It refers to both the species of snake, and where the video was captured, believed to be the Palm Beach waterfront mansion belonging to Mehmet Oz, the controversial celebrity medic now serving as administrator of the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services. Related: RFK Jr once cut penis off ‘road-killed raccoon’ in New York, new book reveals Non-venomous southern black racers are the most common species of snake in Florida, and are known for their speed and agility. They are harmless to humans. It is not clear when the 49-second recording was made, or what happened to the snakes. A voice that sounds like Oz surmises the snakes were having sex, then queries". Write a poem in YOUR OWN DISTINCTIVE STYLE, no more than 60 words long. You may add a one line title at the top if you like.

His wife, Cheryl Hines, is heard urging her husband to be careful as Kennedy shows them off to the camera, then recoils as one rears up and appears to bite his hand. “Cheryl cheerleads the removal of a pair of Black Racers from Dr Oz’s patio,” the post states. It refers to both the species of snake, and where the video was captured, believed to be the Palm Beach waterfront mansion belonging to Mehmet Oz, the controversial celebrity medic now serving as administrator of the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services.
